name: agent-reputation-sdk
description: Ethereum SDK extensions for ERC-8004: Trustless Agents — monorepo root

scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:ts && pnpm run lint:py && pnpm run lint:rs
scripts.lint:py: sh -c 'cd packages/py && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .'
scripts.lint:rs: sh -c 'if [ -f packages/rs/Cargo.toml ]; then cd packages/rs && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; else echo "packages/rs not present yet — skipping"; fi'
